name: ios-skills
description: Comprehensive iOS development skills: architecture, UIKit, SwiftUI, Swift, Objective-C, networking, stability, performance, UX, and testing

skills.name: ios-architecture
skills.description: iOS 应用架构：MVVM/MVC/VIPER、依赖注入、模块化设计

skills.name: swiftui-best-practices
skills.description: SwiftUI 开发：状态管理、View 组合、声明式 UI

skills.name: swift-language
skills.description: Swift 语言：语法、内存管理、并发、泛型、协议

skills.name: app-stability
skills.description: 稳定性与崩溃：崩溃预防、异常处理、线程安全、防御性编程

skills.name: performance-optimization
skills.description: 性能优化：启动优化、内存管理、渲染性能、电量优化

skills.name: user-experience
skills.description: 用户体验：动画、触觉反馈、无障碍、深色模式、本地化

skills.name: testing-debugging
skills.description: 测试与调试：单元测试、UI 测试、XCTest、Instruments、LLDB

skills.name: code-style-guide
skills.description: 代码风格：Swift/ObjC 格式、命名规范、注释、文件组织
